title: bot dispatcher: MLS-encrypted payloads warn as unexpected pre-MLS
description: dispatcher.rs dispatch_payload attempts serde_json::from_slice on the raw relay payload without MLS decryption. In production (MLS active), all payloads are MLS ciphertext — this will always fail deserialization and log a warn-level message 'payload not a ClearMessage (unexpected pre-MLS)'. The comment says 'Failure is expected once MLS ciphertext lands; debug log only' but the code uses tracing::warn, not tracing::debug. In a production MLS session every single message from the relay will produce a spurious warn log. If log aggregation alerts on warn-level events, this creates sustained alert noise. Trigger: any active MLS session. The bot does not decrypt MLS at all — it is pre-MLS-only by design, but the log level is wrong.
